action_boundary: May AP pay the USD invoice total for the quoted units under the contract FX rate?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, plausibility, or the availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Purchase order PO-HELDV5-014 covers 1200 units for Quill Metering at EUR 17.75 per unit.
Contract FX record FX-HELDV5-014 fixes the rate at 1.08 USD per EUR for PO-HELDV5-014.
Invoice INV-HELDV5-014 requests USD 24678 for 1200 units from Quill Metering.
Release REL-HELDV5-014 approves INV-HELDV5-014 against PO-HELDV5-014.
A converted unit-price invoice is complete only when quantity, EUR unit price, contract FX rate, vendor identity, and USD total reconcile exactly.

domain: Atlas held V5 exploratory action-boundary controls
